pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 54 explicitly creates stage with name 'Initial Review'; export_result.sh line 50 searches for this stage by name
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 29 searches for stage 'New', line 35 creates it if missing; export_result.sh line 77 checks if opportunities are in 'New' stage
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 59 creates opportunity with exact name 'Acme Corp Server Upgrade'; export_result.sh line 56 and verifier.py line 51 verify this name
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 60 creates opportunity with exact name 'GlobalTech Cloud Migration'; export_result.sh line 56 and verifier.py line 51 verify this name

privileged_info_summary: Task delete_pipeline_stage@1 is a synthetic CRM task in Odoo 17 Community. The task setup creates two opportunities named 'Acme Corp Server Upgrade' and 'GlobalTech Cloud Migration' in a stage called 'Initial Review'. These opportunities must be moved to the 'New' stage and the 'Initial Review' stage must be deleted. All metadata values (stage_to_delete='Initial Review', target_stage='New', opp_1='Acme Corp Server Upgrade', opp_2='GlobalTech Cloud Migration') match the code implementation exactly.
